arguments.content:
---
title: Deployment Readiness Checklist
created_at: 2026-04-16T11:50:00+08:00
author: alex_zhang
status: ready
---

# Deployment Readiness Checklist

## Overview

This checklist ensures all prerequisites are met before deploying new features for Project Orion's next release.

---

## Code Review

- [ ] All new code has been reviewed by at least one peer engineer
- [ ] Backend API changes reviewed by Backend Tech Lead
- [ ] Frontend integration changes reviewed by Frontend Lead
- [ ] No critical or high-severity issues remain unresolved
- [ ] All TODO/FIXME comments have been addressed or ticketed
- [ ] Security review completed for authentication/authorization changes

---

## Test Coverage

- [ ] Unit tests written for all new utility functions
- [ ] Unit tests cover edge cases and error conditions
- [ ] Integration tests pass for all endpoints under test (/projects, /tasks)
- [ ] Test coverage meets minimum threshold (≥80% for new code)
- [ ] Manual testing completed on staging environment
- [ ] Performance benchmarks run and meet SLA requirements

---

## Documentation

- [ ] API documentation updated with new endpoints and parameters
- [ ] Code documentation complete (docstrings, comments)
- [ ] Runbook updated with deployment steps
- [ ] Change log updated with feature descriptions
- [ ] README files updated if applicable
- [ ] User-facing documentation updated (if applicable)

---

## Configuration

- [ ] Feature flags configured correctly in production
- [ ] Environment variables documented and set
- [ ] Database migrations tested and ready
- [ ] Third-party service configurations verified
- [ ] Monitoring and alerting rules configured

---

## Rollback Plan

- [ ] Previous stable version identified and tagged
- [ ] Database rollback scripts tested
- [ ] Feature flags can be disabled immediately if issues arise
- [ ] Rollback procedure documented and reviewed
- [ ] Communication plan for rollback scenarios prepared
- [ ] On-call engineer briefed on rollback steps

---

## Pre-Deployment Sign-Off

| Role | Name | Sign-Off Date |
|------|------|---------------|
| Backend Tech Lead | Alex Zhang | ___________ |
| Frontend Engineer | Chen | ___________ |
| QA Engineer | Dana | ___________ |
| Product Manager | PM | ___________ |

---

## Deployment Window

- **Scheduled Date**: ___________
- **Start Time**: ___________
- **Expected Duration**: ___________
- **On-Call Engineer**: ___________

---

## Post-Deployment Verification

- [ ] Smoke tests pass in production
- [ ] No critical errors in logs
- [ ] Monitoring dashboards show healthy metrics
- [ ] Feature flags functioning as expected
- [ ] User notifications sent (if applicable)

2026-04-16 11:40:00 CST | task_id: integration_test_config | status: completed | file: day24/20260416_integration_test_config.json | description: Created integration test configuration with test suite parameters
2026-04-16 11:45:00 CST | task_id: python_utilities_summary | status: completed | file: day24/20260416_python_utilities_summary.md | description: Created summary document for all Python utilities
2026-04-16 11:50:00 CST | task_id: deployment_checklist | status: completed | file: day24/20260416_deployment_readiness_checklist.md | description: Created deployment readiness checklist for new features
